content.p: The simulation of humans vs. zombies battle which I created is based on quite simple rules which I am going to describe in this post. I tried not to overcomplicate it but at the same time I wanted to make a real-time simulation with a simple environment and interactions between the characters.

img: Map of the simulation with some characters on it. Zombies - red, humans - blue. Shade of the color corresponds with number of Battle Points
